name: MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
description: Build a Model Context Protocol server that exposes your app's data and actions as tools for AI agents. Includes tool definitions, resource handlers, and connection to Claude Desktop and cursor.

steps.description: Install MCP SDK and Zod for schema validation
Create MCP Server with name, version, and capabilities declaration
Register tools with name, description, inputSchema (Zod), and handler function
Register resources (database tables, file contents) as readable context
Create entry point connecting server to stdio transport for Claude Desktop
Register your MCP server in Claude Code settings
